arts.ttl: Under-fire Heidenheim coach talks club's poor form and his future
arts.sum: Heidenheim coach Frank Schmidt has given a self-critical interview, admitting that he would have been sacked by now at many other clubs.

arts.ttl: Preview: Heidenheim vs. Copenhagen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Conference League clash between Heidenheim and Copenhagen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
